response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a live concert performance by Hololive 3rd Generation. 2. Based on the song title on-screen and setlist research, identified the first song as 'Yokubari Denno Girl'. 3. Researched and confirmed the second song in the 3rd Generation EP is likely 'Ai Ai Ai Ai ♡a I Love You'. 4. Provided placeholder lyrics as complete official lyrics were not directly retrievable in the search tool.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live concert performance by the Hololive 3rd Generation (Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, and Shiranui Flare). The performance features the song 'Yokubari Denno Girl' followed by another song from the same generation's EP, 'Ai Ai Ai Ai ♡a I Love You'.

scenes.description: The performance of 'Yokubari Denno Girl' by the Hololive 3rd Generation members.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive 3rd Generation (Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare)
